message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "Team Member" as TeamMember
participant ":CreateTaskUI" as CreateTaskUI
participant ":CreateTaskController" as CreateTaskController
participant ":DataManagement" as DataManagement
participant "projectStore : ProjectStore" as projectStore
participant "project : Project" as project

activate TeamMember
TeamMember -> CreateTaskUI: 1 Starts the Task creation in User Story
activate CreateTaskUI
CreateTaskUI -->> TeamMember: 2 request the project code
TeamMember -> CreateTaskUI: 3 Inserts the project code
CreateTaskUI -->> TeamMember: 4 request sprint id
TeamMember -> CreateTaskUI: 5 Inserts the sprint id
CreateTaskUI -->> TeamMember: 6 request user story id
TeamMember -> CreateTaskUI: 7 Inserts the user story id
CreateTaskUI -->> TeamMember: 8 request the task information: name, description, type, startDate, endDate
TeamMember -> CreateTaskUI: 9 Inserts request the task information: name, description, type, startDate, endDate
CreateTaskUI -> CreateTaskController: 10 createTaskInUserStory(code, sprintID, userStoryID, name, description, type, startDate, endDate)
activate CreateTaskController
CreateTaskController -> DataManagement: 11 projectStore = getProjectStore()
activate DataManagement
DataManagement -->> CreateTaskController: 12 projectStore
CreateTaskController -> projectStore: 13 project = getProjectByCode(code)
activate projectStore
projectStore -->> CreateTaskController: 14 project
CreateTaskController -> project: 15 getSprintByID(sprintID)
activate project
rectangle "ref\nTaskCreationInUserStory" as ref
deactivate project
project -->> CreateTaskController: 16 true
deactivate CreateTaskController
CreateTaskController -->> CreateTaskUI: 17 true
deactivate CreateTaskUI
CreateTaskUI -> TeamMember: 18 Task created successfully
deactivate TeamMember

@enduml
```
